name: ai-kanban
description: ***prep for tech interview*** A collaborative, real-time project management dashboard where a user can upload a product brief, and an AI agent breaks it down into actionable tasks.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run start:dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm --prefix frontend run start" "npm --prefix backend run start:prod"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
